arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou faces worst injury crisis of career on return to Glasgow
arts.sum: Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven set to be out till Christmas as the former Celtic boss returns to Glasgow for Battle of Britain clash as Rangers host Tottenham

arts.ttl: Ange: Romero's Spurs criticism not handled well
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou has said that Cristian Romero's criticism of the club's hierarchy following the team's 4-3 defeat to Chelsea on Sunday was not handled in the right way by the player and revealed he has apologised for his comments.

arts.ttl: Romero 'apologised' for criticism of Spurs' owners
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou says defender Cristian Romero has apologised for critical comments of the club's owners.

arts.ttl: Howard Webb reveals how Moises Caicedo should have been punished for high challenge on Pape Sarr - as PGMOL chief admits the tackle was 'reckless' in Spurs and Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Eyebrows were raised when the Chelsea midfielder avoided punishment for a high challenge on his opposite numbers, with the tackle ankle-level and potentially seen as dangerous play.

arts.ttl: How much Daniel Levy has paid himself as Tottenham chairman after Cristian Romero speaks out
Ange Postecoglou facing 'worst ever' Tottenham injury list as Cristian Romero leads boss to Rangers crisis point
arts.sum: The thread-bare Premier League side travel to Ibrox for the Europa League clash

arts.ttl: How Spurs' mistakes cost them against Chelsea
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundits Ashley Williams and Troy Deeney discuss the individual Tottenham Hotspur mistakes that resulted in Chelsea coming from two goals down to win 4-3.

arts.ttl: Spurs must believe in what Postecoglou is doing - Sutton
arts.sum: Chris Sutton discusses Ange Postecoglou's problems at Spurs and whether the 4-3 loss to Chelsea shows their style of play in unsustainable.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Cristian Romero's next steps after public Daniel Levy blast
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cristian Romero took aim at the club's chairman Daniel Levy following the weekend defeat to Chelsea, with Ange Postecoglou admitting he has now apologised

arts.ttl: Smirking Ange Postecoglou declares Rangers return is what he loves as he laps up 'bear pit'
arts.sum: The Australian is in dire need of a win as he takes Spurs to Ibrox in the Europa League
